Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Understand the User Prompt: Concept: Temporal Profile... pairs (A,B), (A,C)... Scenario: Global supply chain... Activities: SS, OP, RC, QI, CA, PT, PK, WS, DT, AS. Task: Produce dictionary for representative subset of pairs, including non-adjacent.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Key Considerations for Estimation: Need realistic times for supply chain. SS -> OP: 2-5 days. OP -> RC: 1-4 weeks. RC -> QI: same day. QI -> CA: 1-2 days. CA -> PT: 1 day. PT -> PK: quick. PK -> WS: quick. WS -> DT: days/weeks. DT -> AS: months.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now, non-adjacent pairs: SS -> RC: cumulative ~10 days. SS -> CA: ~12 days. OP -> PT: ~10 days. RC -> DT: ~15 days. QI -> AS: ~45 days. CA -> DT: ~10 days. PT -> AS: ~35 days. SS -> AS: ~60 days.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 2. Draft - Mental Refinement: List pairs and estimates: ('SS', 'OP'): (172800, 43200), ('SS', 'RC'): (691200, 86400), ('OP', 'RC'): (518400, 60480), etc. Aim for 15-20 pairs.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait, lets check realism. High-tech electronics: Adjust CA -> PT to 172800s (2d). WS -> DT: avg 691200s. DT -> AS: 2592000s. Non-adjacent scale appropriately.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Lets recalculate non-adjacent: ('SS', 'RC'): 777600, ('SS', 'CA'): 1036800, etc. Pick solid subset of 15-18 pairs.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Check constraints: Matches format, estimated times, covers direct and multi-step. Verify times: std ~20-50% of mean, realistic for process mining.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-Correction: Ensure dictionary valid Python, covers relationships. Adjust std devs proportional. All good.
